For additional context about technologies to be used, project structure,
shell commands, and other important information, read specs/004-habit-goal-completion/plan.md
<!-- SPECKIT END -->

## Engineering Standards

- Frontend work MUST use TypeScript with React and Vite.
- React class components are prohibited; use functional components and Hooks.
- Keep components modular with one component per file.
- Use Tailwind CSS for utility-first responsive styling.
- Every new feature MUST include Vitest + React Testing Library tests.
- Tests MUST cover core logic, user interactions, and state updates.
- CI/CD MUST run linting and tests before integration.
- Do not auto-commit code; keep changes local for human review and manual commit.
- Add concise comments only when logic is non-obvious.
